name: Medication Review and Reconciliation Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for medication review, medication therapy management (MTM), medication list documentation, and pharmacologic management services. Used in medication management quality measures for older adults and care transitions.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Assessment of and care planning for a patient with cognitive impairment, including medication review
Medication therapy management service(s) provided by a pharmacist, individual, face-to-face, initial 15 minutes, new patient
Medication therapy management service(s) provided by a pharmacist, individual, face-to-face, initial 15 minutes, established patient
Review of all medications by a prescribing practitioner or clinical pharmacist documented in the medical record
Medication list documented in medical record and communicated to the patient/caregiver and/or forwarded to the receiving provider
Pharmacologic management, including prescription and review of medication, when performed with psychotherapy services
